package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for duration_nanoseconds_zero_check: Duration zero checks written as `d.Nanoseconds() == 0` instead of `d == 0`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario477Negative(items []string) int {
	started := time.Now()
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		if !started.IsZero() { total += len(item) }
	}
	return total
}
